## What does this PR do?

One or two sentences.

## Why?

Link the issue (`Closes #123`) or explain the motivation.

## How?

Brief description of the approach. Any trade-offs worth flagging.

## Screenshots

For UI changes — before/after screenshots or a short clip help reviewers a lot.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] I tested this manually in the browser
- [ ] I updated docs / README if behavior changed
- [ ] My commits are focused and have meaningful messages

## Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?

Known unknowns, areas where you want a second opinion.
